_comment: Hostname configuration for Akamai Property. POST to /papi/v1/edgehostnames?contractId={CONTRACT_ID}&groupId={GROUP_ID}. Each hostname must be verified via DNS CNAME to {EDGE_HOSTNAME}.edgeservices.net.

hostnames.comments: Primary API + frontend hostname — TLS terminated at Akamai edge via CPS-managed cert.
WWW redirect to apex — handled by Edge Redirector behavior in property-main.json.

dnsInstructions.notes: Apex/naked domain requires ANAME/ALIAS record at DNS provider (not standard CNAME).
Akamai provides 2-4 anycast IPs for apex records — fetch via /papi/v1/edgehostnames API.
